notes: v0.13.5 — HARD/BRUTAL stutter fix (trimmed bullet trail 8→5, glow loops 3→2, hit burst 10→6, death burst 40→22 — particle count was the bottleneck) + PLAY cards smaller (row height-capped at 360px, hero stretch 2.0→1.5) + card backgrounds redesigned (no more 12×10 tile banding — now navy + radial accent glow + thin top edge) + SETTINGS row background rewritten (smooth radial cyan glow, no more 8-segment block edges). Windows only.
